caption_baseline: The living room is filled with furniture including a dining table surrounded by chairs. There are two people present; one person is standing near the kitchen area while another person sits at the table. In addition to the seating arrangement, there's a TV on the left side of the room, a potted plant placed close to it, and several vases scattered throughout the space.
The image features a large brown bear sitting on grass with its mouth open. It appears to be looking at something off-camera while resting outdoors.

The room features a large bed with blue sheets and blankets, situated next to a window. There is also a chair placed near the bed. In addition to these furnishings, there are numerous books scattered throughout the space, indicating an interest in reading. Furthermore, several potted plants can be found around the room, adding a touch of greenery to the environment.

The scene features a red stop sign with white letters on it, located at an intersection near some trees. There are several vehicles present, including two trucks parked nearby and another car further away. Additionally, there is a person standing close to one of the trucks, possibly observing their surroundings or waiting for someone.

The scene features a group of teddy bears sitting on top of each other. There are four teddy bears in total, with one large bear occupying most of the space while the others sit around it. They appear to be arranged for display or as part of an artistic arrangement.
The woman is skiing down a snowy slope while wearing sunglasses. She has her arms outstretched for balance as she glides through the snow.
The kitchen is small with a white refrigerator on one side and an oven on the other. There are two cabinets above the countertops, providing storage space for kitchen items.

The scene features two men playing baseball on a field. One man is holding a baseball bat while another player wearing a glove stands nearby, ready for action. There are also several other people present in the background of the image.

The scene features a man playing tennis on an outdoor court. He is holding a red racket and appears to be swinging it with great force. Another person can be seen standing nearby, possibly watching the game or waiting for their turn to play. There are two sports balls present in the scene - one nearer to the player and another further away.

The scene features a group of young people standing on a tennis court with their coaches. There are several children wearing white shirts, while others have different colored outfits. Some kids can be seen holding tennis rackets, indicating they might be participating in a match or practice session.

The scene features a man sitting on a bench near a body of water with several boats floating nearby. Another person is standing next to him, taking pictures of the beautiful view. There are also two birds present in the area, one closer to the left side of the frame and another further away towards the right.
The woman is holding a Hello Kitty cell phone while looking at it closely. She appears focused on her device as she interacts with it.

The scene features a group of children riding on a merry-go-round at an amusement park. There are several kids sitting together on benches, enjoying their time as they ride around. In total, there are nine people present in the picture, including both adults and children.

The image features a plate with two sandwiches on it. One of them is half-eaten, while the other one remains intact. There are also two bowls present in the scene - one near the top left corner and another at the bottom right side. Additionally, there's a person partially visible in the upper part of the image, possibly enjoying their meal.

The scene features a person paddling on top of a surfboard in calm waters near land. They are wearing a hat while navigating through the water with their oar. There is also another smaller boat nearby, possibly belonging to someone else enjoying the same activity.

The image features a desk with two laptops on it. One laptop is positioned towards the left side of the table while the other one is located more centrally. There are also two keyboards placed near each laptop, indicating they might belong to different users or devices. Additionally, there's a mouse situated close to the right edge of the table.

The scene is a busy highway with multiple cars driving underneath an overpass. There are several traffic signs on the bridge above, including one pointing towards Hollywood Blvd. Some of these vehicles have California license plates.

The scene features a red double-decker bus driving down a street with several people around it. There are at least nine individuals visible on the sidewalk, some of them carrying backpacks. In addition to the bus, there is another smaller vehicle further away on the right side of the road.
The black cat is laying on a laptop computer keyboard.

The scene features a large airplane flying high above an iconic bridge with two tall towers on either side of it. The plane is positioned towards the top left corner of the image, while the bridge spans across most of the frame.
The scene features a zebra with its head down, nuzzling another zebra's neck. They are standing together on grassy terrain, creating an intimate moment between them.
The room features a bed with a colorful comforter on it, situated next to a window. There is also a chair placed near the table.

The scene features a purple bus driving down a street with several people around it. One man is sitting on top of the bus while another person stands nearby. There are also two traffic lights present in the background, one closer to the left side of the frame and the other further back towards the right side.
The image features a white bowl filled with green apples. There are several apples of varying sizes placed within the bowl, creating an appealing display.

The scene is set on a baseball field with multiple players participating in the game. One player is holding a bat, ready for his turn at home plate. Another player can be seen wearing a baseball glove, likely preparing to catch the ball. There are also other players scattered around the field, some closer to the batter while others are further away. Overall, it's an active moment during a professional baseball match.

The scene features a dining table with various food items on it. There is a cake placed towards one end of the table, surrounded by plates containing different types of cheese and crackers. Additionally, there are multiple wine glasses scattered across the table, along with cups and bowls filled with other snacks. The arrangement suggests a casual gathering where guests can enjoy both sweet treats like the cake as well as savory options such as cheeses and crackers.
The scene features a man riding on top of a surfboard as he catches a wave in the ocean. He is skillfully balancing himself while enjoying his time in the water.

The black and white photograph features a group of children posing for a picture together. They are all dressed up with ties, indicating a formal occasion. There is a mix of boys and girls among them, creating an atmosphere of camaraderie and unity.

The scene features a wooden dining table with various food items on it. There is a white plate containing bread, cheese, and crackers. Additionally, there are two bowls placed near each other, one of which contains soup. Two wine glasses can also be seen on the table, along with utensils such as forks and knives. A person is present at the edge of the frame, possibly preparing to enjoy this meal.

The scene features a skier performing an impressive jump off of a snowy hillside. There are several people watching the action unfold, including one person standing close to the left side of the frame and another on the right side. In addition to the skier, there is also a backpack located near the bottom-right corner of the image.

The scene features a person standing on skis atop a snow-covered mountain with a beautiful view of the surrounding landscape. They are wearing black pants and appear to be enjoying their time outdoors.
The image features a doughnut sitting next to a banana on a table. Both items are placed inside plastic bags, which are likely for convenience when eating them.
The scene features a white coffee mug with a pirate skull on it sitting next to a black knife. There is also a table present in the background of the image.

The scene is set at a wine tasting event where several people are gathered around a bar with various bottles of wine on display. There are multiple individuals engaged in conversation while enjoying their time together. Some guests can be seen holding glasses filled with wine as they socialize and taste different varieties.

The scene features a marshy area with several boats docked near the shore. There are two birds standing on the grass close to each other, possibly enjoying their time by the water. Additionally, there is another bird flying above them, adding life to the serene environment.
The man is kneeling down next to a white toilet with his hands on it. He appears to be working on fixing something related to the toilet.

The scene features a group of people standing on snow-covered ground near mountains. There are at least six individuals present, with some closer together while others stand more apart. They appear to be enjoying their time outdoors during winter.

The image features a white bowl filled with rice and red chili on top of it. There are several pieces of broccoli scattered throughout the dish, adding color and nutritional value to the meal. The combination of rice, chili, and broccoli creates an appetizing and balanced dish.

The scene features a person riding on top of a skateboard while standing on a wooden platform. They are wearing black shoes with white designs. There is another skateboard located near the first one, possibly belonging to someone else who may join them for some fun outdoor activities.

The image features a bunch of bananas on top of each other, with some ripe ones at the bottom and others higher up. There are several banana bunches stacked together, creating an interesting visual effect.

The image features a plate of food with rice on top, accompanied by chicken and vegetables such as broccoli and carrots. There is also a fork placed next to the plate. The dish appears to be ready for consumption, showcasing an appetizing meal.

The scene is set in a living room where several people are gathered around playing video games on a Nintendo Wii console. One of the players is holding a remote control while others watch her play. There's also a couch located towards the right side of the room.

The scene features two men shaking hands at a formal event. One man is wearing glasses while another has his back turned away from them. They are surrounded by several other people who appear engaged in conversation or attending the gathering. There are multiple dining tables with chairs placed around them, indicating an indoor venue for this social occasion.
The man is wearing a yellow shirt with a brown tie. He has dark hair and appears to be looking downward at something.

The living room features a couch with a television on top of it. There is also a chair positioned nearby. In addition to these furnishings, there are two people present in the scene, one standing closer to the left side while the other person stands nearer to the right side of the frame.
The image features a man skillfully riding a wave on his surfboard. He is wearing a yellow shirt while maintaining balance as he navigates through the water.
The black cat is sitting on a desk next to an open laptop computer with its head turned towards it.

The scene features a group of people gathered around a ribbon-cutting ceremony with children present. One man is cutting the ribbon using scissors while others watch closely. There are several individuals standing near each other, some wearing ties as part of their attire. In addition to the people, there's also a bicycle parked nearby.

The scene features a large white bus driving down a street with buildings on either side of it. There are two people standing near the front of the bus, possibly waiting for their ride or just observing the surroundings. Additionally, there is another person further back along the street, likely going about their daily activities.
The man is sitting on a wooden floor in front of a mirror. He appears to be taking a picture with his cell phone while looking at himself in the mirror.
